full_text:
Wang Cheng 王承
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Cheng (王承). Local officer near Chang’an, he feared Ma Teng was plotting against him so attacked and drove Ma Teng away. Wang Cheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
